subject: [PATCH 06/19] nfsd: check nfsd4_acl_to_attr() return value in nfsd4_create()

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server code where ACL translation errors were being silently discarded during file creation. The patch adds an early exit check after nfsd4_acl_to_attr() to ensure that any errors are properly handled and do not cause the CREATE operation to proceed without the requested ACL.
